title: The Worst Generation Stands Before Kaido and Big Mom
description: On pages 12–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14, King, Kaido as The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
scene: The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were able to travel forward in time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Is gone to the after- life!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: they were alive, all this time...the sparks of rebellion are still...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: was brought to the flower capital, and executed as criminal.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kaido! What are you playing at?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You let him drop you to the ground just like that?

summary: This section advances the Wano - The Worst Generation Reaches the Roof storyline with 22 dialogue beats. The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
